creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Alex S from comment #5)
> Strictly speaking, nowadays Wine _also_ has a Vulkan backend* for
> wined3d (d3d9, d3d11, etc), it's just immature and requires setting
> a certain registry key to enable it. Therefore, after this option
> merge VKD3D_DESC is no longer accurate.

Do you have a suggestion on how to update VKD3D_DESC?

Happy to improve that. My main focus here was to reduce user confusion
and combinatorial explosion of two options (= 4 cases) which nobody will
regularly test.
